title: NCBI GEO: archive for gene expression and epigenomics data sets: 23-year update.
author: Clough E Barrett T Wilhite SE Ledoux P Evangelista C Kim IF Tomashevsky M Marshall KA Phillippy KH Sherman PM Lee H Zhang N Serova N Wagner L Zalunin V Kochergin A Soboleva A
content: S-EPMC10767856 PMC10767856 NCBI GEO: archive for gene expression and epigenomics data sets: 23-year update. The Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) is an international public repository that archives gene expression and epigenomics data sets generated by next-generation sequencing and microarray
